title: narcissus × koshinomurae nothosubsp. sanchezii
intro: Narcissus × koshinomurae nothosubsp. sanchezii, commonly known as the Narcissus Koshinomurae, is a hybrid of the Daffodil (Narcissus) species, specifically a cross between Narcissus koshinomurae and Narcissus pseudonarcissus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal remedies, where it is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Narcissus Koshinomurae include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an expectorant, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers are often dried and used in infusions, or made into a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
